description_long: This skyscraper features a distinctive cloverleaf footprint, with four rounded towers joined at the center, creating a striking and symmetrical silhouette. The facade is dominated by dark, horizontal bands of windows and balconies, interspersed with lighter structural elements, giving the building a rhythmic, layered appearance. Each tower section is lined with continuous balconies, separated by vertical columns, and the base is landscaped with greenery and small trees. The roof is flat and uniform, with subtle detailing along the edges. The ground level includes a recessed entry area and landscaped courtyards, enhancing the building's urban integration. The overall design is modern, with a focus on geometric repetition and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, cloverleaf-shaped skyscraper with four rounded towers, dark horizontal window bands, and continuous balconies, set above landscaped courtyards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two prominent trees, and the symmetrical arrangement of the four rounded towers.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the landscaped courtyard and additional greenery at the base, with the same cloverleaf tower structure.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the uniformity of the balconies and window bands, with less visible landscaping and a more closed-off base.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the rounded tower edges and two trees at the base, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features alternating dark and light horizontal bands, with extensive use of glass for windows and balconies, separated by vertical concrete columns. Rounded tower edges and continuous balconies create a rhythmic, layered texture, while the base is softened by landscaped greenery.
